mapper.sql: select recommend_id, user_id, biz_type, biz_id, recommend_reason, recommend_score, source_type, scene_code, expose_status, click_status, feedback_status, expire_time, create_time from sc_learning_recommendation
mapper.insert: insert into sc_learning_recommendation(user_id, biz_type, biz_id, recommend_reason, recommend_score, source_type, scene_code, expose_status, click_status, feedback_status, expire_time, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{recommendReason}, #{recommendScore}, #{sourceType}, #{sceneCode}, #{exposeStatus}, #{clickStatus}, #{feedbackStatus}, #{expireTime}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from sc_learning_recommendation where recommend_id in #{recommendId}
